query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.plotAreaSqft, p.gfaResidentialSqft, p.gfaRetailSqft, p.gfaSqft, p.bua, p.manualBuaSqft, p.estimatedConstructionPricePerSqft, p.landPrice FROM projects p WHERE p.name LIKE '%جداف%' OR p.name LIKE '%Jaddaf%' LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute 
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.plotAreaSqft, p.gfaResidentialSqft, p.gfaRetailSqft, p.gfaSqft, p.bua, p.manualBuaSqft, p.estimatedConstructionPricePerSqft, p.landPrice FROM projects p WHERE p.name LIKE '%جداف%' OR p.name LIKE '%Jaddaf%' LIMIT 3;
